options.name: -all_registers
options.description: display all registers found during the analysis, even those which do not drive to other macros. It must be used with -through_registers

options.name: -direction
options.description: specify the pin direction of objects to be displayed (in|out|all), default:all

options.name: -insts
options.description: specify the macros to be displayed

options.name: -level
options.description: specify the trace level (1 to 10), default:1

options.name: -min_connection
options.description: specify the trace mimimum connection, default: 1

options.name: -ports
options.description: specify the IO ports to be displayed
